building_type: Type of the building (mosque, palace, etc.)
location: Location of the building as written in the Wikipedia infobox
construction_start: Year construction of the building started
construction_end: Year construction of the building was completed
construction_time: Duration of construction in years, calculated with: (construction_end)-(construction_start)
renovation_date: Year of renovation or restoration if available
wikipedia_url: Wikipedia page used as the data source
